rationale: Review 2 catches two additional placement issues grounded in the diff — foundational classes (`AffineAlgGroup`, `AlgPoints`) buried inside a reductive-named file, and `IsUnipotent` mixed into reductive-layer stubs — while Review 1 only surfaces the directory-path deviation (which both reviews share) plus an import concern outside the placement rubric.
